issues: 1x silhouette reads as thin diagonal slash not a bow
no charm or personality — fails sticker test
white highlight pixels dissolve into light background
no round/soft shapes — fully edgy/linear construction
reasoning: At 1x the longbow is a barely-visible white diagonal sliver with zero recognizability as a weapon — it could be a scratch or noise artifact. The 4x panels reveal clean enough pixel construction with orange outline, green body, white highlight streak, but the silhouette is fundamentally a thin diagonal line: sharp, aggressive, and charmless. There are no round or soft shapes, no personality markers, no cute details that would pass the sticker test. On the light background the white highlight pixels vanish, further hurting contrast. The color palette (orange/green/white) is pleasant but wasted on a shape that conveys no warmth. This design is clear-but-charmless at 4x and completely unreadable at 1x — a double failure against the Cute & Charm + Silhouette Clarity criteria.
